creator: ddavid_3@yahoo.com
text:
While trying to fetch the lastest distfile for Utah-Glx
make reports " Couldn't fetch it, please try to retrieve this port
manually into /usr/ports/distfiles and try again"
I also noticed quite a few distfile site's have no access, trying a few
it seems the directory structure is different from what the port is 
looking for.

Also went to ftp2.freebsd.org/pub/Freebsd/ports/local/-distfiles/sobomax
and the file is not present there either

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/utah-glx
type "make"
